.file-embed.background: color(srgb 0.96 0.961 0.99) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: color(srgb 0.8865 0.8759 0.981) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: color(srgb 0.8865 0.8759 0.981) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: color(srgb 0.8865 0.8759 0.981) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: color(srgb 0.968 0.9688 0.992) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: color(srgb 0.936 0.9376 0.984) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: color(srgb 0.853 0.8298 0.982) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: color(srgb 0.231373 0.698039 0.807843 / 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0.853 0.8298 0.982) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0.853 0.8298 0.982) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
